name: conext-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM CoNEXT (International Conference on emerging Networking EXperiments and Technologies), whose research papers publish in PACMNET (Proceedings of the ACM on Networking): its two annual submission cycles (December and June) feeding one program, the journal-style one-shot 'major' revision decision, double-anonymous HotCRP submission, the SIGCOMM public-review and shepherding culture, systems-networking evidence and measurement rigor, the reproducibility committee and optional ACM badges, and the PACMNET camera-ready. Grounded in the CoNEXT 2026 call, the CoNEXT 2025 CFP, PACMNET journal pages, ACM DL, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
